title: azalea × mortieri
intro: Azalea × mortieri, also known as the Mortimer azalea, is a hybrid azalea species that is a cross between Rhododendron ponticum and Rhododendron luteum. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Azalea × mortieri include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Azalea × mortieri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
